   186→export function I18nProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
   187→  const [language, setLanguage] = useState<Language>('en');
   188→
   189→  useEffect(() => {
   190→    document.documentElement.dir = language === 'ar' ? 'rtl' : 'ltr';
   191→    document.documentElement.lang = language;
   192→  }, [language]);
   193→
   194→  const toggleLanguage = () => {
   195→    setLanguage(prev => prev === 'en' ? 'ar' : 'en');
   196→  };
   197→
   198→  const t = (key: string) => {
   199→    return translations[language][key] || key;
   200→  };
   201→
   202→  return (
   203→    <I18nContext.Provider value={{ language, direction: language === 'ar' ? 'rtl' : 'ltr', toggleLanguage, t }}>
   204→      {children}
   205→    </I18nContext.Provider>
   206→  );
   207→}
   208→
   209→export function useI18n() {
   210→  const context = useContext(I18nContext);
   211→  if (!context) {
   212→    throw new Error('useI18n must be used within an I18nProvider');
   213→  }
   214→  return context;
   215→}
